loop1.title: Input vs Output Energy
loop1.note: Showing total active power as a proxy for UPS input/output energy rates; per-phase power is not measured for this asset.

loop1.title: Load Anomalies
loop1.note: Showing load factor and present load as percentages of rated capacity (600 kVA). The 'load-anomalies' endpoint is used for trend/anomaly detection, but specific dip/surge event counts are not available for this UPS asset.
